evidence_summary: CREA AlimentiNutrizione lists Stracchino as a cheese/dairy food with food code 167250 and English label soft cheese, stracchino; this supports treating stracchino as a concrete cheese identity, not generic cheese.
CREA AlimentiNutrizione lists Fiocchi d'avena as a cereal derivative with food code 003030 and scientific name Avena sativa; this supports a product-form identity distinct from generic oats.

GOV.UK protected food names register lists Pecorino Romano as a registered protected food name, product class cheeses, protection type PDO, country of origin Italy, and original EU registration date 1996-06-21; this supports a distinct protected cheese identity.

evidence_summary: MASAF national PAT list evidence shows a Tuscany cheese entry for Stracchino, Crescenza; this supports the Italian synonym relationship between stracchino and crescenza but remains review-only evidence.
